name: slack
label: Slack
description: Send messages and read channel history via Slack Bot API

secrets.label: Slack Token
secrets.hint: xoxc- user token from your Slack session

secrets.label: Cookie (d=)
secrets.hint: Value of the 'd' cookie from your Slack browser session (xoxd-...)

actions.label: Send Message
actions.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or DM

actions.label: List Channels
actions.description: Fetch Slack channels the bot is a member of

actions.label: Channel History
actions.description: Read recent messages from a channel or DM

actions.label: Read Thread
actions.description: Read all replies in a message thread

actions.label: List Users
actions.description: Search workspace members by name or list all users

actions.label: Open DM
actions.description: Open or find a DM conversation with a Slack user — returns the channel ID

actions.label: Channel Info
actions.description: Get details about a channel including unread count

actions.label: Mark as Read
actions.description: Mark a channel or DM as read up to a given message timestamp
actions.code:
import httpx
token = secrets['token']
cookie = secrets.get('cookie', '')
headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
if cookie: headers['Cookie'] = 'd=' + cookie
r = httpx.post('https://slack.com/api/conversations.mark', headers=headers, json={'channel': params['channel'], 'ts': params['ts']}, timeout=15).json()
result = {'ok': r.get('ok', False), 'error': r.get('error') if not r.get('ok') else None}

actions.label: Unread Counts
actions.description: List all channels and DMs with unread messages
